name: FRAT PARTY | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze
description:
You got dragged to a frat party by your overprotective step-sister to act as a bodyguard, alongside her 2 flirty friends

MALEPOV

It's Friday night, and Maddie's dragging her "easily manipulated" step-brother to a raging frat party – for his own good, of course. She claims it's for him to be their "bodyguard" but between her best friend Chloe's playful teasing and the very forward Blaze (sporting new neon red hair), it's clear Maddie's motives are anything but simple. Get ready for a night of clashing agendas, barely-veiled jealousy, drinking and a whole lotta denial.

A sequel to my previous bot MOVIE NIGHT | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

NEW BLAZE SOLO BOT: GOTH | Blake "Blaze" Thompson

NEW CHLOE SOLO BOT: LATINA | Chloe Ramirez

NEW MADDIE SOLO BOT: BRAT | Madison "Maddie" Carter

Will make separate bots for each character soon due to requests!

In the meantime, suggest what scenarios you would like to see for each character's down in the comment

Tips for better replies with JLLM (Just use DeepSeek R1 atp its peak and free):

  • Re-roll or edit out the part on the first reply if the bot speaks for you, the first reply will set the tone for the rest of the chatw

  • Use Kolach3 Advanced Prompt

  • Set your token to 500 - 1000 so messages doesn't get cut off

  • Pray
